legal.privacyIntro: We are committed to protecting your personal data and your right to privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our grocery delivery service.
legal.privacyDataContent: We collect information you provide directly, including your name, email address, optional phone number, delivery or pickup details, saved addresses, and order details. We also process account, session, and security data needed to operate and protect the service.
legal.privacySocialContent: When you sign in with Google or Facebook, we receive your name, email address, and a unique provider account identifier. We use and store these details to create or link your customer account, authenticate you, protect the account, and provide account features. Google ID tokens and Facebook access tokens are verified during sign-in and are not stored by Asia Deli Go. We do not sell this sign-in data or share it with other merchants. Infrastructure and email providers may process it only as needed to operate, secure, and support the account. Google or Facebook may receive technical data and use their own cookies under their respective privacy policies when their sign-in service is enabled.
legal.privacyCookiesContent: We use essential cookies to maintain your shopping cart and session. We may also use analytics cookies to understand how you use our service. You can control cookie preferences in your browser settings.
legal.privacyRightsContent: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. You can also request a copy of your data or ask us to stop processing it. Contact us to exercise these rights.
legal.privacyDeletionTitle: Account and social sign-in data deletion
legal.privacyDeletionInstructions: To request deletion of your Asia Deli Go account and data associated with Google or Facebook sign-in, email us from the address assigned to the account and state that you want the account and related personal data deleted. We may retain only records that must be kept to meet legal obligations.
legal.privacyDeletionFacebook: You can also remove Asia Deli Go in Facebook under Settings and privacy, Settings, then Apps and Websites. To request deletion of the data held by us, still send the email request described here.
legal.privacyContactContent: Send privacy-related questions or requests to
legal.privacyContactUnavailable: Privacy contact details are temporarily unavailable.
legal.termsIntro: These terms govern your use of our grocery delivery service. By placing an order, you agree to these terms.
legal.termsOrdersContent: All orders are subject to availability. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel orders at our discretion. Prices are subject to change without notice, but any changes will not affect orders already placed.
legal.termsPaymentsContent: Payment is required at the time of order. We accept various payment methods including credit cards, bank transfers, and cash on delivery where available. All transactions are processed securely.
legal.termsDeliveryContent: We deliver to addresses within our service area. Delivery times are estimates and may vary. We are not responsible for delays caused by circumstances beyond our control.
legal.termsReturnsContent: If you receive damaged or incorrect items, please contact us within 24 hours. We will arrange a replacement or refund. Perishable items cannot be returned unless they are defective.
